## Checklist

- [ ] I have read `.ai/CONVENTIONS.md`
- [ ] All 17 files created (if new component) per `.ai/component-anatomy.md`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] Tests cover: rendering, interactions, keyboard, accessibility
- [ ] Storybook stories cover all variants, sizes, and states
- [ ] AI manifest is complete with `use_when`, `do_not_use_when`, `decision_tree`
- [ ] Documentation page created/updated
- [ ] No `any` types, no `@ts-ignore`
- [ ] Accessible: axe-core passes, keyboard nav works, screen reader tested
